endpoints.name: Communication & Tonality
endpoints.description:
Identify the purpose and writing style of a written text.

Supported Languages: [`ar`, `de`, `en`, `es`, `fr`, `it`, `nl`, `pt`, `ru`, `tr`, `zh`]

Returned labels:
* action-seeking
* fact-oriented
* information-seeking
* self-revealing
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SYMANTO_API_KEY}} with your SYMANTO API KEY.

endpoints.name: Emotion Analysis
endpoints.description:
Detect the emotions of the text based on Ekman.

Supported Langauges: [`en`, `de`, `es`]

Returned labels:
* anger
* disgust
* fear
* joy
* sadness
* surprise
* no-emotion
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SYMANTO_API_KEY}} with your SYMANTO API KEY.

endpoints.name: Emotion Analysis
endpoints.description:
Detect the emotions of the text.

Supported Langauges: [`en`, `de`, `es`]

Returned labels:
* anger
* joy
* love
* sadness
* surprise
* uncategorized
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SYMANTO_API_KEY}} with your SYMANTO API KEY.

endpoints.name: Language Detection
endpoints.description:
Identifies what language a text is written in. Only languages that our API supports can be analyzed.

Returned labels:
* language_code of the detected language
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SYMANTO_API_KEY}} with your SYMANTO API KEY.

endpoints.name: Personality Traits
endpoints.description:
Predict the personality trait of author of any written text.

Supported Languages: [`ar`, `de`, `en`, `es`, `fr`, `it`, `nl`, `pt`, `ru`, `tr`, `zh`]

Returned labels:

* emotional
* rational
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SYMANTO_API_KEY}} with your SYMANTO API KEY.

endpoints.name: Sentiment Analysis
endpoints.description:
Evaluate the overall tonality of the text.

Supported Languages: [`en`, `de`, `es`]

Returned labels:
* positive
* negative
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SYMANTO_API_KEY}} with your SYMANTO API KEY.

endpoints.name: Extracts topics and sentiments and relates them.
endpoints.description: Extracts topics and sentiments and relates them.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{SYMANTO_API_KEY}} with your SYMANTO API KEY.
